title: Rafa XI
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Rafa}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Rafa XI |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]] *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]] |sector=[[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] |system=[[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]]{{CSWECite|III|74|Rafa system}} |coordinates=T-8 |xyz= |distance= |suns=[[Rafa sun]]''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' |orbited= |position=11 |moons= |routes=[[Arleen Loop]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=[[Water/Legends|Icy]] slush |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=*[[Helium/Legends|Helium]] [[Refinery/Legends|refinery]] *Research installation |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|The governor wants him immediately! Something about a load of cops he tried to maroon on Rafa XI four months ago.|Vuffi Raa, on Lando Calrissian while impersonating a Colonial Constabulary officer|}} '''Rafa XI''' was an [[Water/Legends|icy]] slush [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the outermost [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]]. It was the site of a [[Helium/Legends|helium]] [[Refinery/Legends|refinery]] and a research installation. In [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], after the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and his [[Class Two multi-phasic robot|droid]], [[Vuffi Raa]], disarmed a team of [[Colonial Constabulary]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] who attempted to arrest the former on the planet [[Rafa V]], the duo made the [[Police officer/Legends|police officers]] board their own [[cargo barge]], which was modified by Vuffi Raa to take them on a [[Standard week/Legends|week]]-long trip to Rafa XI. By four [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later, four of the Constabulary troopers Calrissian had attempted to maroon had returned to the [[Governor's office building|administrative building]] of the Rafa [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]], [[Duttes Mer]], on the planet [[Rafa IV]]. ==Description== {{Quote|You did send along that Oseon brandy, I trust?''"
"''Yes, Master, and those…those…''"
"''Holocassettes? Absolutely imperative, old gumball machine. The scenery where they're going is remarkably boring.|Lando Calrissian and Vuffi Raa, on five Colonial Constabulary troopers about to be sent to Rafa XI|}} Rafa XI was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]], a part of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A bleak ball of [[Water/Legends|icy]] slush, Rafa XI occupied the eleventh and outermost [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the Rafa [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Rafa sun|sun]], circling it in the dark, and, along with the rest of the Rafa system, was situated on the [[Arleen Loop]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the [[Arleen system/Legends|Arleen]] and [[Dela system/Legends|Dela systems]]. By [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the [[Star Wars: The Lando Calrissian Adventures|''The Lando Calrissian Adventures'']] trilogy, of which ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' is the first installment, to between [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] and [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]. Rafa XI was the smallest planet of the [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] that spanned the Rafa system. ==History== {{Quote|Summon those four men who went to Rafa XI. They're under house arrest here in the building.|Governor Duttes Mer, to a secretary|}} [[File:Young_Lando-TEA.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Lando Calrissian attempted to maroon five police officers of the Rafa system on Rafa XI.]] In 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], and his [[Class Two multi-phasic robot|droid]], [[Vuffi Raa]], disarmed a group of five [[Colonial Constabulary]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]], which had attempted to arrest Calrissian on the planet [[Rafa V]] and included [[Guard-Captain]] [[Myle Jandler]]. Since Calrissian did not want the [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement]] [[Police officer/Legends|officers]] to further interfere with his search for the [[Mindharp of Sharu/Legends|Mindharp]] artifact but was not willing to [[Death/Legends|kill]] them, Vuffi Raa modified the [[cargo barge]] the Constabulary contingent had used to arrive on Rafa V so that it would take them to Rafa XI. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] disabled the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] controls and programmed into the vessel's [[Computer/Legends|computer]] an unalterable course for Rafa XI. The journey would take the barge a [[Standard week/Legends|week]] to complete, and since Vuffi Raa also destroyed the ship's communications [[Antenna/Legends|antennas]], it would not be able to communicate with the rest of the system except by the troopers shining [[Glowrod/Legends|flashlights]] out the vessel's [[Viewport/Legends|viewports]]. Calrissian also instructed his droid to provide the Constabulary troopers with [[Oseon brandy]] and [[holocassette]]s, as the captain characterized the "scenery" of the barge's destination as "remarkably boring." Before the vessel departed from Rafa V, Jandler, who had grown tired of following orders from the Rafa system's [[Governor/Legends|governor]], [[Duttes Mer]], affirmed to both Calrissian and his team that, once they arrived at Rafa XI, they would not hurry about reporting the circumstances of their marooning. At some point during the subsequent four [[Standard month/Legends|months]], four of the Constabulary [[Officer/Legends|officers]] who had been sent to Rafa XI traveled back to the planet [[Rafa IV]], where they were placed under house arrest in Governor Mer's [[Governor's office building|office building]]. Four months after Calrissian's encounter with the Constabulary troopers on Rafa V, Vuffi Raa, who had become separated from his owner, donned a trooper's [[Clothing/Legends|uniform]] and traveled to the [[penal colony of Rafa IV]] in order to free Calrissian from [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisonment]]. Once there, the droid, acting as a Constabulary officer, claimed to the [[Unidentified supervisor|supervisor]] of the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] compound that Calrissian was to be immediately turned over for transportation to Mer, who supposedly wanted to interrogate the man for his attempted marooning of the policemen on Rafa XI. ==Locations== Rafa XI was the site of a [[Helium/Legends|helium]] [[Refinery/Legends|refinery]], which Lando Calrissian thought of as relatively impressive, and a considerable research installation. ==Behind the scenes== Rafa XI was first mentioned in ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'', the [[1983]] first entry in [[Star Wars: The Lando Calrissian Adventures|''The Lando Calrissian Adventures'']] trilogy of novels by [[L. Neil Smith]]. "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] source article published in the [[Voyages SF 13|thirteenth]] issue of the ''[[Voyages SF]]'' magazine, placed the planet in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}} it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.{{UnlicensedStatus}} The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently overrode the ''Voyages SF'' placement by establishing that the Rafa system, and therefore Rafa XI, was instead situated in grid square T-8 as part of the Centrality. ==Appearances== *''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{CSWECite|III||Rafa system}} ===Non-canon sources=== *{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}} {{Un}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rafa XI |nl=Rafa XI }} [[Category:Ice planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Rafa system locations]]
